title: nageia alpina
intro: Nageia alpina, also known as the alpine nageia or mountain nageia, is a species of coniferous tree belonging to the family Podocarpaceae. Traditionally, Nageia alpina has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nageia alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Nageia alpina is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cultures, it is also used in traditional remedies as a powder or oil.
